mapper.select: SELECT c.id, c.name, c.parent_id, c.sort, c.description, c.create_time, c.update_time, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM book b WHERE b.category_id = c.id AND b.deleted = 0) as book_count FROM book_category c WHERE c.deleted = 0 ORDER BY c.sort ASC, c.id ASC

SELECT c.id, c.name, c.parent_id, c.sort, c.description, c.create_time, c.update_time, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM book b WHERE b.category_id = c.id AND b.deleted = 0) as book_count FROM book_category c WHERE c.deleted = 0 AND c.id = #{id}
SELECT c.id, c.name, c.parent_id, c.sort, c.description, c.create_time, c.update_time FROM book_category c WHERE c.deleted = 0 AND c.parent_id = #{parentId} ORDER BY c.sort ASC
